revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:8 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:8月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 8월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:8 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:八月十三]][[zh:八月十三]]
{{Not to be confused with|August 13|qq=August 13}}
<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=八月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 8월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar August|qq=}} '''August 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|August (Lunisolar)|ja|8月 (旧暦)|lt=August (Hazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/August (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 8th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Kyōhō|en|Kyōhō|qid=Q1145048|lt=Kyōhō|1=Kyōhō}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1716|en|1716|qid=Q6892|lt=1716|1=1716}} {{ill|September 28|en|September 28|qid=Q2883|lt=September 28|1=September 28}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|ja|Tokugawa Yoshimune|1=Tokugawa Yoshimune|2=ja|3=徳川吉宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokugawa Yoshimune|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q319664}} , lord of {{ill|Kishū Domain|en|Kishū Domain|qid=Q1069187|lt=Kishū Domain|1=Kishū Domain}} , becomes the 8th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} .{{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * Kyōhō 15 (Gregorian {{ill|1730|en|1730|qid=Q6957|lt=1730|1=1730}} {{ill|September 24|en|September 24|qid=Q2890|lt=September 24|1=September 24}} ) – The {{ill|Dōjima Rice Exchange|en|Dōjima Rice Exchange|qid=Q4120982|lt=Dōjima Rice Exchange|1=Dōjima Rice Exchange}} in {{ill|Osaka|ja|大坂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osaka|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 大阪|1=Ōsaka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11439906}} is officially recognized by the Edo shogunate.{{Citation needed|date=2021-04|qq=}} == Births == * {{ill|Shōō (Kamakura period)|en|Shōō (Kamakura period)|qid=Q1327371|lt=Shōō (Japan)|1=Shōō (Kamakura period)}} 4 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1291|en|1291|qid=Q5554|lt=1291|1=1291}} {{ill|September 7|en|September 7|qid=Q2852|lt=September 7|1=September 7}} ) – {{ill|Tōin Kinkata|en|Tōin Kinkata|qid=Q11555868|lt=Tōin Kinkata|1=Tōin Kinkata}} , {{ill|Daijō-daijin|1=Daijō-daijin|2=ja|3=太政大臣|ja|Daijō-daijin|1=Daijō-daijin|2=ja|3=太政大臣|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daijō-daijin|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1157586}} , scholar of {{ill|Yūsoku kojitsu|ja|有職故実|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yūsoku kojitsu|1=Yūsoku Kojitsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1623327}} (+ {{ill|1360|en|1360|qid=Q6150|lt=1360|1=1360}} ). * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 12 (Julian {{ill|1569|en|1569|qid=Q6653|lt=1569|1=1569}} {{ill|September 23|en|September 23|qid=Q2888|lt=September 23|1=September 23}} ) – {{ill|Tachibana Ginchiyo|en|Tachibana Ginchiyo|qid=Q3273091|lt=Tachibana Ginchiyo|1=Tachibana Ginchiyo}} , head of the {{ill|Tachibana clan (Japan)|ja|筑前立花氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tachibana clan (Japan)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491567|1=Tachibana clan (samurai)}} (+ {{ill|1602|en|1602|qid=Q6727|lt=1602|1=1602}} ). * {{ill|Kangxi Emperor|ja|Kangxi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangxi Emperor|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 50 (Gregorian {{ill|1711|en|1711|qid=Q6866|lt=1711|1=1711}} {{ill|September 25|en|September 25|qid=Q2886|lt=September 25|1=September 25}} ) – {{ill|Qianlong Emperor|en|Qianlong Emperor|qid=Q19133|lt=Qianlong Emperor|1=Qianlong Emperor}} , 6th emperor of the {{ill|Qing dynasty|en|Qing dynasty|qid=Q8733|lt=Qing dynasty|1=Qing dynasty}} (+ {{ill|1799|en|1799|qid=Q7827|lt=1799|1=1799}} ). * {{ill|Culture|en|Culture|qid=Q11042|lt=Bunka|1=Culture}} 6 (Gregorian {{ill|1809|en|1809|qid=Q6919|lt=1809|1=1809}} {{ill|September 22|en|September 22|qid=Q2889|lt=September 22|1=September 22}} ) – {{ill|Yokoi Shōnan|en|Yokoi Shōnan|qid=Q865960|lt=Yokoi Shōnan|1=Yokoi Shōnan}} , {{ill|Confucian scholar|ja|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Confucian scholar|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru (Confucian scholar)|qq=}} (+ {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Jōwa (Heian period)|en|Jōwa (Heian period)|qid=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|1=Jōwa (Heian period)}} 9 (Julian {{ill|842|en|842|qid=Q24730|lt=842|1=842}} {{ill|September 20|en|September 20|qid=Q2892|lt=September 20|1=September 20}} ) – {{ill|Tachibana no Hayanari|en|Tachibana no Hayanari|qid=Q1062686|lt=Tachibana no Hayanari|1=Tachibana no Hayanari}} , {{ill|Bureaucrat|en|Bureaucrat|qid=Q572700|lt=bureaucrat|1=Bureaucrat}} , one of the {{ill|Sanpitsu|en|Sanpitsu|qid=Q834347|lt=Sanpitsu|1=Sanpitsu}} . ---
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|8|12|8|14|7|13|9|8|0813|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
